content: An autonomous AI agent can leverage biological agent principles of virulence to optimize context compression: just as a pathogenic biological agent only encodes the minimal essential genetic material needed to invade a host and replicate, an AI agent can dynamically compress its active context window to retain only the high-impact 'virulent' information that directly drives action toward its goal, discarding low-impact contextual noise. This creates a more efficient goal-aligned agent that does not waste limited context window space on redundant or irrelevant event data from long-running sessions.
